title: Combo IC-50 Serial Dilution of Compounds
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: This protocol outlines serial dilution of compound stock. There is an optional predilution step for each compounds involved. For detailed protocol steps, please see below. Labware setup consists of NEST 12 well 15mL reservoir in slot 1, Nest 96 well 100 uL plate in slot 2,4,5,7,8,10 & 11 as well as P20 filter tips in slot 3 and P200 filter tips in slot 6.
Using p300, transfer VOL1 ul from the DMSO reservoir in slot 1 into B-H 1/12 in slot 7 (Vertical stamp plate) keep tip
Using p300, transfer VOL2 uL from the DMSO reservoir in slot 1 into A2-12/H2-12 in slot 8 (Horizontal stamp plate) dispose tip
(Steps 3-6 are optional) Using p300/20, transfer VOL3/4 from the DMSO reservoir to A2/11 in slot 7
Using p300/20, transfer VOL5/6 from the DMSO reservoir to B1/G1 in slot 8
Using p300/20, transfer VOL7/8 from well B1/B2 slot 2 (compounds C/D) into A2/11 in slot 7, using new tips
Using p300/20, transfer VOL9/10 from well A1/A2 from slot 2 (compounds A/B) into B1/G1 in slot 8, new tips
Using p300, transfer VOL11 from well B1 slot 2 or well A2 slot 7 (if optional predilution was done) to A1 slot 7, mixing before, keep tip
Using p300, transfer VOL12 from well A1 to well B1, mix after, keep tip
Repeat from B1-C1 C1-D1 … F1-G1 d tip
Using p300, transfer VOL11 from well B2 slot 2 or well A11 slot 7 (if optional predilution was done) to A12 slot 7, mixing before, keep tip
Using p300, transfer VOL12 from well A12 to well B12, mix after, keep tip
Repeat from B12-C12 C12-D12 … F12-G12 dispose tip
Using p300, transfer VOL13 from well A1 slot 2 or well B1 slot 8 (if optional predilution was done) to A1 slot 8, mixing before, keep tip
Using p300, transfer VOL14 from well A1 to well A2, mix after, keep tip
Repeat from A2-A3 A3-A4 … A10-A11 dispose tip
Using p300, transfer VOL13 from well A2 slot 2 or well G1 slot 8 (if optional predilution was done) to H1 slot 8, mixing before, keep tip
Using p300, transfer VOL14 from well H1 to well H2, mix after, keep tip
Repeat from H2-H3 H3-H4 … H10-H11 dispose tip
Using p20, transfer VOL15 from well H1 slot 7 to wells H1-12 slot 10, blowout after, keep tip
Repeat for rows G-A col 1
Using p20, transfer VOL15 from well H12 slot 7 to wells H1-12 slot 11, blowout after, keep tip
Repeat for rows G-A col 12
Using p20, transfer VOL15 from well A12 slot 8 to wells A12-H12 slot 4, blowout after, keep tip
Repeat for row A cols 11-1
Using p20, transfer VOL15 from well H12 slot 8 to wells A12-H12 slot 5, blowout after, keep tip
Repeat for row H cols 11-1
